title: JMS we create smile - Plastic High Grade Hipster Style Washing Clothes Linen Laundry Storage Basket | Set of 2 - Large (60 Ltr) and Small (38 Ltr) Basket | Silver
features: Set of 2 - Large (60 Ltr) and Small (38 Ltr) Basket | Silver

Material : The basket is made from Heavy duty durable plastic with Smooth finish prevents snagging clothes. Instead of throwing dirty clothes on the floor, you can put all your laundry in this Hipster laundry Basket to keep your bedroom neat and clean.
Oval with an inward curve at one side to aid carrying - The basket is deep enough to hold plenty of clothes and has strong Integral Molded handles for carrying .
Small 38 Ltr- Approx Dimensions: 60 cm x 39 cm x 30.5 cm Weight: 0.835 kg
Large 60 Ltr- Approx Dimensions: 49.00 x 37.00 x 24.00 cm, Approx Weight: 0.595 kg.
description: Product Description JMS We create Smile Multiple uses - Whether you’re wanting to use it to store your laundry, children’s toys or even your collection of shoes, this basket for a variety of different uses! Capacity - 60 Ltr Colour - Silver Material - Plastic Easy To Carry - Convenient handles for easy carrying and ideal for everyday use, with Integrated Handles for easier carrying. Features ventilation holes enhance air flow and reduce damp and stagnated air from building up in between wash days. Easy To Store & Wash – Can be effortlessly wiped clean in seconds with smooth finish to stop snagging clothes. It can carry plenty of your laundry clothing’s which need to be washed. Stylish Design– A Stylish Basket Designed Storage Solution to organise your bathroom, Kitchen, or utility area.
